title: Iria subtetrastachya

This family is further divided into various subfamilies, with Iria subtetrastachya belonging to the subfamily Ruschioideae. The Ruschioideae subfamily comprises a diverse group of plants, primarily found in southern Africa. Iria subtetrastachya is native to this region, where it grows in sandy or rocky soils. Further classification within the plant kingdom may include its order, family, genus, and species levels.
